item.title: hyper-neutrino / advent-of-code
item.description:
Desc: My Advent of Code submissions. For 2021 and before, these are the original code I used, without any modifications after-the-fact. As such, they are probably not as efficient or short as they should be, because I want a working solution faster, not a better solution. For 2022 and after, these are the solutions uploaded to my YouTube channel.
Lang: Python
Star: 131
